data.title: CN Declares Second-Quarter 2026 Dividend
data.description: Montreal, April 29, 2026 - CN revealed its decision to issue a dividend for the second quarter of 2026 on their common shares. The Board of Directors gave the green light to a payment of C$0.9150 per common share. Shareholders of record as of June 9, 2026, will receive this quarterly dividend on June 30, 2026. The dividend payment reflects the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders and maintaining financial stability.
B. Riley Securities Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results

data.title: GM To Roll Out Google Gemini AI Across 4 Million Cars: Here's What Owners Need To Know
data.description: General Motors Co. announced the integration of Alphabet Inc.'s artificial intelligence model Google Gemini into more than 4 million vehicles in the U.S. through an upcoming update. The rollout will include GMC, Cadillac, Buick, and Chevrolet vehicles from the 2022 model year onwards, featuring Google Built‑in technology. According to GM, Gemini allows for natural voice commands without the need to remember specific phrases. The AI model will provide functions such as summarizing and reading incoming texts. This move signifies a significant advancement in AI technology adoption within the automotive industry.

data.title: Bitcoin Holds $77,000, Ethereum, XRP Rebound While Dogecoin Rallies On FOMC Day
data.description: Bitcoin surpassed the $77,000 mark on Wednesday morning driven by positive sentiment following statements made by the SEC chair during the Bitcoin 2026 event. On Tuesday, Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $89.7 million, whereas Ethereum ETFs recorded net outflows of $21.8 million. Current cryptocurrency prices include Bitcoin at $77,620.71, Ethereum at $2,334.55, Solana at $85.32, XRP at $1.39, Dogecoin at $0.1100, and Shiba Inu at $0.056473. The overall market capitalization of meme coins saw a 2.8% decrease. For more details, visit a financial news website.

data.title: Snap-on to Present at Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference
data.description: A leading company in Kenosha, Wisconsin, Snap-on, will be participating in the Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference on May 6, 2026. The presentation is set to commence at 1:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

data.title: PHINIA to Participate in Bank of America’s 33rd Annual Industrials, Transportation and Airlines Key Leaders Conference
data.description: PHINIA Inc. (NYSE: PHIN), a top player in premium fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket solutions, revealed it will take part in Bank of America’s 33rd Annual Industrials, Transportation, and Airlines Key Leaders Conference on May 13, 2026. The participation in the conference, set to be held in Auburn Hills, Mich., will involve in-person attendance. It will feature a Q&A segment aimed at delving into the dynamics of the markets PHINIA caters to globally and discussing the company's operations. This move comes as PHINIA continues to establish its presence as a prominent player, offering innovative solutions in its respective sectors.

data.title: XCharge North America’s GridLink Earns 2026 E+E Leader Award for Innovation in Sustainability
data.description: XCharge North America (XCharge NA), a subsidiary of XCHG Limited (Nasdaq: XCH), has been recognized for its flagship product, GridLink, in the 2026 Environment+Energy Leader Awards. GridLink is designed to enhance the North American electrical grid through high-power EV charging and battery-integrated solutions. The award highlights companies making strides in energy management and environmental performance. This recognition underscores XCharge NA's commitment to innovation and sustainability in the energy sector.

Reports: In Moscow, ahead of May 9, mobile communication restrictions will become "more powerful" and will apply not only in the center, but also within the Moscow Ring Road, reports the "BBC Russian Service" citing sources close to "Rostelecom" and one of the telecom operators.

data.title: MGP Ingredients Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: MGP Ingredients, Inc. (Nasdaq: MGPI), a major supplier of branded spirits and food ingredients, announced its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The company expressed satisfaction with these results, noting that sales met projections, and adjusted EBITDA and adjusted basic EPS exceeded forecasts. Throughout the quarter, MGP emphasized disciplined operations and sustained value generation. The positive outcomes indicate a successful start to the fiscal year for MGP Ingredients, Inc.

data.title: EMCOR Group, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Norwalk, Conn., EMCOR Group, Inc. (NYSE: EME) released its first-quarter results for 2026. Revenues for the quarter reached a new quarterly high at $4.63 billion, marking a significant 19.7% rise from the $3.87 billion recorded in the same period in 2025. When factoring in additional acquisitions and excluding the effects of selling operations in the United Kingdom, the company experienced organic growth in the first quarter.

data.title: Ion Exchange Expands Global HYDRAMEM® Membrane Solutions Through Strategic Technology Collaboration with MANN+HUMMEL
data.description: A collaboration has been announced between Ion Exchange (India) Ltd and MANN+HUMMEL, with a focus on technology transfer and manufacturing. The partnership involves key operations in Mumbai, India, as well as Ludwigsburg, Germany. The collaboration aims to leverage expertise from both companies to enhance production efficiency and innovation. This strategic alliance is set to drive advancements in the industry and is expected to impact various sectors.

data.title: FTI Consulting Makes Significant Investment in Cybersecurity, Data Privacy and Information Governance Capabilities With 10 Senior Hires
data.description: On April 29, 2026, FTI Consulting, Inc. disclosed the addition of five Senior Managing Directors and five Managing Directors, bolstering their expertise in cyber risk, data privacy, and information governance. These new appointments are poised to strengthen the company's capabilities in navigating critical areas of importance. FTI Consulting, listed on the NYSE under the symbol FCN, continues to expand its team with key leadership additions to address the evolving landscape of cybersecurity.

data.title: Cronos Group Inc. to Hold Virtual 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: In Toronto on April 29, 2026, Cronos Group Inc. (CRON) announced its upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for June 18, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET. The meeting will be held by the company to address various shareholder-related matters and discuss the strategic outlook for the future.

data.title: CN Reports Strong First Quarter Operational and Commercial Performance
data.description: In Montreal on April 29, 2026, CN disclosed its financial and operational performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The company's shares are listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as CNR and on the New York Stock Exchange as CNI.

data.title: Roadzen’s drivebuddyAI Wins $2.5 Million Contract to Bring AI-Powered Safety to 3,000 Truck Fleet
data.description: A total of 3,000 heavy-duty trucks in a fleet will be equipped with a six-camera Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) by drivebuddyAI. The deployment was secured due to the company's patented AI technology and following a thorough assessment by one of India's leading safety-oriented fleet operators. There is a possibility of expanding this installation to 10,000 vehicles within the next five years.

data.title: Borregaard ASA: Reporting of transactions in Borregaard ASA's shares made by person discharging managerial responsibilities
data.description: Today, the CEO and primary insider, Tom Erik Foss-Jacobsen, acquired 3,500 shares of Borregaard ASA at a rate of NOK 144.45 each. Post this purchase, Foss-Jacobsen's ownership of Borregaard ASA stands at 35,375 shares, accompanied by holding 153,000 options in the company. The transaction took place at the Oslo Stock Exchange.

data.title: Crypto investor turns $3,100 into $23M as 10,000 ETH moves from dormant wallet from 2015. Analysts suggest custody change not a sell.
data.description: Recently, there has been movement in a wallet that has been inactive since 2015, with 10,000 ETH being transferred. Experts suggest that this transfer is more likely due to a custody restructuring rather than a sale of the cryptocurrency.
ProVen Growth and Income VCT plc extends 2026/2027 offer.

data.title: Ceragon to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 19, 2026
data.description: Ceragon, a major provider of comprehensive wireless connectivity solutions, is set to reveal its earnings report on April 29, 2026. Following this, management will conduct an investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to delve into the results. The company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol CRNT.
